title: Devotion
writer: Pamela Wynne, Horace Jackson, Graham John
actors: Ann Harding, Leslie Howard, Robert Williams
plot: The poor, downtrodden (beautiful, of course) "dutiful" daughter of a London society family falls for a barrister, disguises herself, and takes a job as governess to his son. Adapted from the novel, "A Little Flat in the Temple"
